title: Show HN: Semble – Code search for agents that uses 98% fewer tokens than grep
summary: Semble is an open-source code search tool for AI agents that combines static embeddings (Model2Vec) with BM25 and code-aware reranking. It achieves 98% fewer tokens than grep+read, 99% of transformer retrieval quality, and runs entirely on CPU. Designed as an MCP server, it integrates with Claude Code, Cursor, and other agent frameworks.
